title: chloraea johowiana
intro: Chloraea johowiana, also known as the Orange-Flowered Greenhood, is a type of orchid native to the southern parts of South America. It has been traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Chloraea johowiana include its ability to aid in wound healing, reduce fever, and alleviate respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma. Traditionally, the plant is prepared for medicinal use by making a tea from its flowers or roots, or by applying a topical solution made from its extracts.
